spatial_layout.summary: Canyang Ao is a small old relay-road farming and hunting village. The village road and blood-check gate lead to the Luo medicine house threshold; the medicine house, rear entrance, water vat, and old well form one courtyard; the side lane leads to a ditch, insect cart ruts, the narrow valley trap, and the outer slope facing the north black-stone gap.
screen_direction_rules: Village road and crowd pressure extend upward in vertical compositions.
The spear line cuts across the medicine house threshold and rear-yard access.
The old well, water vat, and medicine house door must stay readable as one courtyard cluster.
The insect wooden cart tracks lead toward the north-side mountain road.
The valley trap leads into the beast-path slit, then out to the outer slope.
The outer slope callback must let the viewer look back down toward the burning well and medicine house while sensing the north black-stone gap ahead.
practical_lights: medicine-house warm doorway dimmed by wood cabinets
Qingming cold-white incense line close to the ground
night fire dark red rim light and smoke
moon-white glint only as a tiny reflection on water, oil paper, or relay-token edge

shared_design_rules: Low-saturation cinematic realism, low-magic eastern epic, 9:16 vertical production reference.
Human living spaces are poor and pressured but orderly: maintained bow rack, stacked herb baskets, intact work clothes, useful repairs.
Qingming pressure appears through white register, insect-wax seals, cold incense, short spears, and partial dark-green chitin limbs, not through monster crowds.
Zhaoming old-imperial traces are partial, worn, hidden, or covered: broken sun-moon lines, old relay scratches, moon-white glints, and dull gold-red fragments.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI panels, letters, watermarks, or readable writing inside images.
Use current stable faction emblem PNGs only as shape/material references. Do not redesign or overwrite emblem files.

locations.name_cn: 残阳坳火前主场景总览
locations.camera_facing_details: Use a vertical high three-quarter view or compressed long-lens village threshold view, readable on mobile, with the medicine house and old well aligned as the emotional center.
continuity_locks: not a golden pastoral village
not a slum
spatial relationship must support episodes 01 and 02

locations.name_cn: 残阳坳夜火主场景总览
locations.camera_facing_details: Use smoke and fire as edge pressure, not as a full-screen blaze; old well and medicine house silhouette remain recognizable.
continuity_locks: no mass slaughter panorama
fire is shown through objects and structure collapse
Bai Yi and Qingming marks stay clean/cold against warm fire

locations.camera_facing_details: Foreground mud and ruts lead eye toward the black-stone gap while the background keeps the burning village identifiable.
continuity_locks: does not open the old relay door
only direction and cold wind hint toward north slope
after-fire Canyang Ao must not return to intact village

locations.camera_facing_details: A vertical mid-close set reference with shoulders and spear shafts cutting the frame; Qingming tools readable but no text.
continuity_locks: blood pattern is inspection effect, not Shen Weisang's Ling Wing trace
Qingming soldiers appear only in partial chitin details

locations.camera_facing_details: Keep the doorway vertically framed and practical; it must work for both pre-fire interrogation and later fire-lit escape.
continuity_locks: doctor's house is orderly and used
door plate may carry Qingming seal but no readable lettering

locations.camera_facing_details: The medicine cabinet dominates the vertical frame; warm dusk is suppressed by old wood and Qingming cold white.
continuity_locks: hidden relay traces not visible in this general interior plate
keep Luo Qinghe's practical medical order even under pressure

locations.camera_facing_details: Close tactile detail reference. Show first clear old relay evidence but keep it worn, partial, and being covered.
continuity_locks: no complete clean Zhaoming emblem
no readable inscription
wax covers evidence instead of attacking like magic

locations.camera_facing_details: First read the water vat and well together, then show sightline back to medicine house doorway.
continuity_locks: moon-white glint only as a line reflection
do not reveal full jade piece
well is connected to medicine-house courtyard

locations.camera_facing_details: Compact route reference with smoke used to hide traces but not destroy spatial readability.
continuity_locks: Shen Weisang handles smoke and traces by hunter experience
Yan Nanzhi remains guarded, not trusting yet
no old relay mastery

hero_props: medicine-name wooden tags without readable text
locations.camera_facing_details: A vertical action set plate that keeps the water ditch, cart, and northward rut in one readable direction.
continuity_locks: Zhaomian abduction is a visible fact, not extended suffering display
white child worker is institutional executor, not new subplot lead

locations.camera_facing_details: Keep the trap mechanics readable: rope latch, log path, stone wall, and beast slit. Mantis Blade pursuers appear as partial limbs and shadows.
continuity_locks: trap works by hunter setup, not magic
Ling Wing trace is only a short pain flash
Mingjin does not become a shockwave

hero_props: burnt hair cord with small herb knot
locations.camera_facing_details: Foreground evidence should lead the emotional read; background fire is secondary but recognizable.
continuity_locks: half relay token warms and briefly glints only
no stone door opening
Bai Yi remains distant through register action and incense trace

locations.camera_facing_details: Dense practical material board with no labels or UI. All objects should feel photographed in the same Canyang Ao set.
continuity_locks: not a product catalog
not an infographic
no text labels
keeps human order rather than ruin-only texture
